One scan reveals everything.

Fields

Your Pets, Protected.

Attach Smartchain to your pet’s collar. If they wander off, anyone who finds them can reach you instantly.

Lost? Stolen?

We’ve got you.

Normal Mode

Your info stays private.

Only you can see it.

Lost Mode

Your contact info becomes visible.

Finders can reach you.

Stolen Mode

Full visibility + alert status.

Maximum reach.

Simple.

Three steps. That’s it.

Clip it to your keys, bag, or pet collar.

Anyone scans the QR code.

They see your info instantly.

Ready?

Get your Smartchain today.

Scan any Smartchain QR code instantly
Manage your digital profile on the go
Lost Mode sends instant finder alerts

App Store
